name: io.github.ar-agents/mcp
description: Argentine business automation: Mercado Pago, AFIP/ARCA, WhatsApp, banking, shipping (7 packages).

environmentVariables.name: MP_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Mercado Pago access token (TEST- prefix for sandbox, APP_USR- for production). Enables MP tools.

environmentVariables.name: AFIP_CERT_PEM
environmentVariables.description: AFIP/ARCA X.509 certificate (PEM string) for WSAA authentication. Enables CUIT padron + factura electronica tools.

environmentVariables.name: AFIP_KEY_PEM
environmentVariables.description: AFIP/ARCA private key (PEM string) for WSAA authentication. Required if AFIP_CERT_PEM is set.

environmentVariables.name: AFIP_CUIT
environmentVariables.description: Issuer CUIT (Argentine tax ID) registered with the AFIP cert. Format: 20-XXXXXXXX-X.

environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Meta WhatsApp Business Cloud API token. Enables WhatsApp tools.

environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Meta WhatsApp Business phone-number ID. Required if WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN is set.
